nasb.text: Saul and the men of Israel were gathered and camped in the valley of Elah, and drew up in battle array to encounter the Philistines.

esv.text: And Saul and the men of Israel were gathered, and encamped in the Valley of Elah, and drew up in line of battle against the Philistines.

cnv.text: 掃羅和以色列人也聚集起來，在以拉谷安營；他們列出戰陣，要迎戰非利士人。

ccb.text: 扫罗和以色列人也聚集起来在以拉谷安营，摆好阵势准备迎战。
